storyInfo: Both Rhine and Gordon Tannen's secrets are exposed, bringing exhibition preparations to a screeching halt. The hearing for this special incident is delayed, and Sky Jagger brings people to protect the Rhine's 'tree', while Gustave and Maylander forcibly intervene. Nasti is conspicuously missing at this juncture.

attributes.content: What the freak is with that tree up in the air?
attributes.name: Angry Company Representative

attributes.content: There are only a few days until the exhibition! How many stands does that thing take up? Rhine Lab didn't apply for upper-level exhibition rights!
attributes.name: Angry Company Representative

attributes.content: Rhine and the ATAO must be colluding! I saw Gordon Tannen on that tree that night!
attributes.name: Anxious Company Representative

attributes.content: Gustave, former ATAO Director, promised in a broadcast that he'd have an explanation the next morning. And what actually happened?
attributes.name: Anxious Company Representative

attributes.content: Not one word from the committee! I bet they're stalling for time!
attributes.name: Anxious Company Representative

attributes.content: Please remain patient.
attributes.name: Staff

attributes.content: The credibility of the Propeller Paradise administration and engineering departments is at stake here. We need to deal with this carefully and come up with a plan that can satisfy the hundreds of corporations that have an interest in the project.
attributes.name: Staff

attributes.content: Who's asking you to deal with it carefully?
attributes.name: Angry Company Representative

attributes.content: Yes?
attributes.name: Staff

attributes.content: Who gives a crap? It's not like this is another Ring Lab.
attributes.name: Angry Company Representative

attributes.content: The engineering department's inspections have stopped, and the administration's vetting is over. Who cares if Propeller Paradise officials are doing their jobs or not?
attributes.name: Angry Company Representative

attributes.content: But the hearing is a necessary part of the oversight process...
attributes.name: Staff

attributes.content: Investigations and trials, those are your problem. We just want to know the result of the hearing—
attributes.name: Anxious Company Representative

attributes.content: The Air Expo Columbia we expected to make a splash in Columbia and even all of Terra—is it gonna happen or not?
attributes.name: Anxious Company Representative

attributes.content: Out of the way.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: I said, out of the way.
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: You really think that sitting here puts your illegal equipment out of our reach?
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: It remains Rhine Lab property until the hearing is underway. Besides, what are you calling 'illegal equipment'?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Don't you recognize a floating botanical unit when you see it? The saplings floating around you are no different from the one behind us.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You insolent little... I need more men over here!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Sky, we don't have the numbers. We can only hold out for so long, if they decide to use force.
attributes.name: Researcher

attributes.content: Besides, we don't know whether this tree-like device behind us is legal, or whether it's safe. After all, it's only been two years since Control Wright...
attributes.name: Researcher

attributes.content: I'll ask you one question. As a scientist, are you willing to just hand over the product of Director Lunorey's sweat and blood?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: No, but...
attributes.name: Researcher

attributes.content: Then take action. Leave no regrets.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: If only we had more people. But Rhine only has so many people on Propeller Paradise...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Did you forget that we're Rhine Lab people too, Mr. Jagger?
I didn't want to drag you into this.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: You're worried about the hearing? Hah, it's not like we haven't seen our share of trumped-up charges.
attributes.name: Tester B

attributes.content: Those guards wouldn't have gotten onto this platform if you called us sooner.
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: Bunch of slumslugs trying to play the hero?
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Possession of illegal equipment, destruction of property, aiding and abetting... there's enough to keep all of you locked away for years!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: I'd already be locked away if Director Lunorey didn't take me in.
attributes.name: Tester B

attributes.content: You wanna touch the tree, you have to go through us!
attributes.name: Tester A

attributes.content: Don't threaten me with a good time!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Rhine researchers and testers form a wall against the guards attempting to enter, while curious onlookers on the outside look up at the towering 'tree'.
A tall, dark figure walks past the rear of the crowd, footsteps clanking.
So... this is Rhine's 'tree'.
It's an honor to see you here.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Oh, you flatter me, Mercia. I've been on an extended holiday and it's about time I got back in the saddle.
Are you here for the hearing?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Yes. The design of the Maylander Emergency Management Council badge is pretty nice. You should try one on.
Is my mission over?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Our mission has only just started.
What are your orders?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: No rush. These past few days have been quite eventful. Other than Nasti and Gordon Tannen, are there any other stories that I should hear?
Good.
See you at the ropeway station in five minutes. There's so much going on with Propeller Paradise that I'm sure I'll need a local guide.
Understood.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: (Broken muttering)
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Sorry, I should have closed the window.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Company reps and testers are protesting on the streets. The longer the hearing takes, the more restless they get.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Are you feeling better?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: (Weak breathing)
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: You're in poor shape.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: You've already seen Director Lunorey. Perhaps I should send you back to the Convallis—
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: No... no...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Another no, just like last night.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Things will only get messier on Propeller Paradise in the coming days.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: It'll be even more difficult to leave.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: We're in jail again! They didn't even bother to change our cell!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: The time of the hearing keeps changing... you think they might be looking for more evidence and stack even more charges on us?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Look, if they ask, I'm telling the truth that you're the impostor!
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: Come on, say something, you're scaring me...
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: You know, nomadic prisons on the barrenlands could become tourist attractions. The only problem is that it's much easier to get in than out.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You're still thinking about tours at a time like this?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: You've already lost one client, and now you're putting your other one in jail?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: I'll find her. And there's no need for you to worry.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: How do you figure?
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: No trial, no ID check, no notice to appear... you think the guards are just stalling for time to find a way to charge us?
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Oakley

attributes.content: I don't think so. I think it's a sign—
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: You and I are not the focus of this hearing.
attributes.name: Ferne

attributes.content: Ferne and Oakley are in jail. Merry hasn't been seen since last night. All the phone lines at the registrar are busy. Everyone and their Originium slugs are looking for me and Nasti.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: It's time I put what I learned from the old man into practice. I'll have an answer for everything. I have nothing to fear!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Looks like the old fox has lost his touch. No one's come to interrogate me yet.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Wait a second!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Phew... alright, I still show up as the chief executive of Propeller Paradise on the terminal.
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Beep—'Sky Conqueror' is currently under excessive stress. Please remember your health. We are on a long journey that leads beyond Terra.
attributes.name: Space Finbeast

attributes.content: Dammit, are they gonna start that hearing or not? Everything would be over and done with if I were in charge! That old coot just keeps tripping me up. It's been this way for seven years!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Why haven't you gotten one bit better in the past seven years?
Gustave...
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: How would YOU do it, if you were in charge?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Uh...
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: You thought you could pat yourself on the back for stopping the Rhine inspections, thinking you could continue to run your little hustle worry-free...
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: What do you think ATAO was, a kindergarten? Is that how you ended up this naive?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Everything would have gone smoothly if not for that bloody tree! This is all Nasti's fault!
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Smoothly? Even a junior assistant under Nasti saw through your tricks.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: The whole country would've seen your dirty laundry if he weren't every bit as naive as you, so much that he came to me for help.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: So tell me, how do you plan on dealing with it?
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: ...Please... help me... sir...
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: Hmph. Whatever the reason Rhine had to build this floating unit, we can't let them continue to define their own creations.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: The administration should have had full authority over this, but it has been excluded from the assessment, thanks to your incompetence.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: You mean, we'll need a third party?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: A scientific consultant who is objective, professional, with the appearance of impartiality.
attributes.name: Gustave

attributes.content: Mr. Tannen. It's a pleasure.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant

attributes.content: He doesn't look like a scientific consultant at all... can he really handle this Rhine stuff?
attributes.name: Gordon

attributes.content: I visited the floating platform in order to familiarize myself with the assessment subject.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant

attributes.content: It's certainly an impressive 'tree'. And there was plenty of activity in its shade.
attributes.name: Scientific Consultant

attributes.content: Over our cold, dead bodies!
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: (Mr. Jagger...)
attributes.name: Tester

attributes.content: (Just bluffing.)
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Did radiation from beyond the Starpod fry your brain or something? You really want to bleed for this?
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: You'll get your wish, then!
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: Stop.
That uniform... you're with Maylander?
attributes.name: Propeller Paradise Police

attributes.content: We are with the Maylander Foundation's Emergency Management Council. According to the bylaws of Propeller Paradise, the Council has the authority to take over all administrative and management functions in the event of an accident or disaster.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: You can check with Gordon Tannen and Gustave.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: Emergency Management Council?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Yes, Mr. Jagger.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: We understand your position, but we advise you to avoid any reckless actions. We are authorized to take extraordinary measures against you and your colleagues, if necessary.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: So Propeller Paradise is in a state of emergency, and your preliminary investigation has defined yesterday's event as a—'special incident'?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Yes. The Council has established a special investigation team to obtain evidence from the scene and persons of interest.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: The investigation is ongoing. A hearing is the only fair and just course of action, in the absence of an official judicial institution. We thank you for your patience.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: Does Rhine keep possession of this 'floating botanical unit' until the hearing?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Of course.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: I hope your investigation is as fair and just as the conclusion you just reached.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: There is no need to worry.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: The safety of the temporary floating platform has been ensured. Bravo is resuming patrol.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: Are we just gonna leave, Mr. Jagger?
attributes.name: Tester

attributes.content: Maylander's authority looks real, judging from the reaction of the guards.
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: The hearing keeps getting delayed, and things are still in flux. We won't learn anything if we stay here. Besides...
attributes.name: Sky Jagger

attributes.content: Have any of you seen Director Lunorey?
attributes.name: Sky Jagger
